shell.menuDescription: Application sections: dashboard, athletes, statistics, and settings.

auth.signInDescription: Use your coach email and password to open your SWIMLYTICS workspace.
auth.signUpDescription: Your data is stored in your Firebase project. Only you can access athletes and sessions tied to this account.
auth.accountReady: Account ready — sample athletes and sessions were added.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Appearance, JSON backups, and your Firestore workspace.
settings.languageDescription: Interface language. Saved to your coach profile and this browser.
settings.appearanceDescription: Light, dark, or follow the system setting. Saved to your coach profile.
settings.backupDescription: Export coach profile, athletes, training sessions, workout templates, and best times as JSON (v3). Import replaces all documents under your Firebase user. v2 and v1 exports are still accepted.
settings.dangerDescription: Delete all athletes, sessions, workout templates, and personal bests in Firestore for this signed-in coach. Your account and sign-in remain; you can import a backup afterward.
settings.footerNote: Firebase Authentication and Cloud Firestore. Deploy firestore.rules so each coach can only read and write their own user document and subcollections.
settings.clearDialogDescription: Athletes, sessions, and personal bests will be removed from Firestore. Export first if you need a backup.
settings.mustBeSignedInImport: You must be signed in to import.
settings.clearSuccess: Cloud data cleared for this account

dashboard.emptyDescription: Hi {{name}} — add athletes and log sessions to unlock roster-wide trends.
dashboard.noDataDescription: Create athlete profiles, then log pool or gym sessions. New accounts include sample data you can edit or remove.
dashboard.ariaWeekPool: Pool distance this week Mon to Sun, {{distance}}.

charts.weeklyDistanceDesc: Meters logged per ISO week (Mon–Sun). Click a bar for Statistics.
charts.monthlyVolumeDesc: Total meters by calendar month. Click the area for Statistics.
charts.volumeByStrokeDesc: Share of pool meters by stroke in the selected window. Click a slice for Statistics.
charts.strokeMixEmpty: No stroke mix in this window.
charts.strokeMixEmptyLong: No stroke mix yet — log pool sessions with different strokes to see this chart.
charts.avgPaceDesc: Session-weighted pace per ISO week (Mon–Sun). Click a dot for Statistics.
charts.emptyNoDistance: No distance logged in this window.
charts.gymWeeklyTimeDesc: Total duration per ISO week (Mon–Sun). Click a bar for Statistics.
charts.gymMonthlyTimeDesc: Total duration by calendar month. Click the area for Statistics.
charts.gymEmptyWindow: No gym time logged in this window.
charts.gymEmptyMonth: No gym time in this month.

athletesList.title: Athletes
athletesList.description: Manage clients, training type, and session history in one place.
athletesList.emptyRosterDescription: Create a profile for each client to log pool or gym sessions and track analytics.
athletesList.noMatchDescription: Try clearing filters or broadening your search.

templates.title: Workout templates
templates.description: Reusable blueprints for pool and gym plans. Assign one template to many athletes in bulk.
templates.emptyDescription: Build a template once, then assign it to any athlete roster that matches the training type.
templates.deleteDialogDescriptionNamed: “{{title}}” will be removed. Sessions already created from this template stay on the athlete timeline.

assignments.title: Bulk assign workout
assignments.description: Pick a template and date, filter your roster, then create real sessions for every selected athlete.
assignments.emptyChooseTemplateDescription: Templates are limited to athletes with the same training type (pool vs gym).
assignments.emptyNoEligibleDescription: Add or update athletes to {{trainingType}} to assign this template.
assignments.noBlocksToast: This template has no blocks. Edit the template first.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.description: Coach-wide aggregates. Filter by athlete, training type, stroke, or date range.
statistics.emptyNoSessionsDescription: Log pool or gym sessions under each athlete to populate analytics.
statistics.emptyWidenDescription: Widen filters or clear the date range to include more history.
statistics.weeklyPoolVolumeDesc: Meters by week (Mon start). Click a bar to open the roster.
statistics.summarySwim: In this slice, pool athletes averaged {{distance}} per session over {{duration}} of swimming.
statistics.summaryGym: Gym blocks averaged {{duration}} per logged session.
